docket_entries.description: UNTIMELY; DEFT DAVID RICARTE WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 20 DAYS NOTICE FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE IN S.F. CO.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RICARTE, DAVID HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.00 FILED BY RODRIGO, ROXANA AS TO DEFENDANT RICARTE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGO, ROXANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICARTE, DAVID $465.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1997, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT RICARTE, DAVID
